column1: This wordbank is used in the initial classification stage within the Name_Matching script. It primirily serves to isolate language that isn't indivudals. If a ownership name contains a word in keywords, it is labeled 'other' within the name matching script.
junior_keywords: This wordbank is used in the initial classification stage within the Name Matching Script. It isolates any record that may be  a junior. This splits juniors from their fathers and allows them to be considered individual owners.
NameCleaner: This is used in the name standardization stage within the Name Matching script. These keywords represt prefixes and titles that need to be dropped from the names. This list could be added to.
biz_word_drop: This keyword bank is used in the 'other' name matching stage of the Name Matching script. Businesses share a lot of component parts in their names and was causing false matches. By removing the ubiquitous component parts, the the issue was mitigated. Can be added too.
trust_kw: This keyword bank is used to isolate family trusts within the Classify_Unknowns script. I found the phrasing of trust was inconsistent and had to add common abbreviations if found in the deleware record.
corp_keywords: This keyword bank is used to spefically isolate some of the corporate language in the Calssify script. This list was derived from an internal review of the DE record to pull out common language across recods. Could and SHOULD be added to.
government_keywords: This keyword bank is used to isolate the public records in the dataset. They will get further subclassed later in teh script.
government_keywords_plus: This keyword bank is to remove any of the following records containg one of these keywords from teh previous government selection. Government cannot cantian words from this list. COuld and Should be added to.
rel_key_words: This keyword bank is used to isolate religious groups in the classify script. This was arbitrarily dervived from lists of common religious organizations. This could and SHOULD be added to.
farms_keywords: This keyword bank is used to help isolate family farms from corporate farms in the classify script.
ckw: This is another corporate script that explicitly calls out owners in the classify script. The previous corp keyword bank was generic, this is explicit, but they function the same way.
kw42: This keyword bank is used to isolate 42s in the classify script. It could and should be added to.
kw43: This keyword bank is used to isolate 43s in the classify script. It could and should be added to.

government_keywords: US DEPT INTR NATL PARK SERVICE
